/opt/homebrew/Cellar/emscripten/4.0.16/libexec/emcc -sEXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=[_malloc,_free,_player_init,_player_load,_player_render,_player_stop,_player_is_finished,_player_get_subsong_count,_player_set_subsong,_player_get_title,_player_detect_duration] "-sEXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=['ccall','cwrap','getValue','UTF8ToString']" -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -sINITIAL_MEMORY=33554432 -sMODULARIZE=1 -sEXPORT_NAME=\"createBennDaglish\" -O2 @CMakeFiles/BennDaglish.dir/objects1.rsp -o /Users/spot/Code/DEViLBOX/benndaglish-wasm/public/benndaglish/BennDaglish.js
